reviews.review_description: Dance! Dance! Dance! is so much fun! It’s exciting and challenging! I had to keep up with Freya, which made it even more enjoyable. Not knowing the next dance move kept me on my toes, and I loved trying to hit all the bubbles. The music is fantastic and really adds to the experience. I had a blast and would definitely recommend it to anyone looking for a fun, active game! My dance moves have definitely improved too! 🤩

developer_response.body:
Hi MiszSpider — thank you so much for the lovely review! We’re really glad you’re having fun with the game.
It’s great to hear you enjoyed dancing with Freya and that the unpredictability of the moves kept things exciting — that sense of learning and reacting in the moment is exactly what we aim for. We’re also thrilled the music and active gameplay clicked for you (and that your dance moves are improving too!).
Thanks again for taking the time to share your experience and recommend the game — it really means a lot to us.
— The Dance! Dance! Dance! Team

reviews.review_description: Great with the new update. Can't wait to see where this game goes. Different than most rhythm games. This one has someone to show you the moves before you try them. Really fun.

developer_response.body:
Hi Nahli  — thank you so much for coming back to update your review, we really appreciate it. :-)

We’re genuinely glad the recent update made a positive difference for you. The call-and-response approach you mentioned is something we’ve been focusing on specifically to make the game more approachable and enjoyable, especially for new and returning players.

We’re continuing to improve and expand the game, and feedback like yours genuinely helps guide where we go next. Thanks again for giving it another try and for your patience along the way.

— The Dance! Dance! Dance! Team

reviews.review_description:
Update: issues have now been rectified by the devs! 

Dance Dance Dance VR delivers an energetic and visually engaging rhythm experience that encourages full-body movement and immersion. The soundtrack is vibrant and well-curated, offering a mix of upbeat tracks that make each session both fun and physically active. The visual presentation and choreography are well-executed, drawing players into the flow of the music.

However, one area that requires attention is the distance calibration between the player’s body and the oncoming orbs. The hit detection occasionally feels misaligned, causing orbs to appear slightly too close or too far from a natural striking range. This calibration issue can disrupt timing accuracy and diminish the overall rhythm experience, especially for players striving for high precision.

Despite this, Dance Dance Dance VR shows strong potential. With a future update addressing the calibration sensitivity, it could easily stand among the most enjoyable and well-polished rhythm titles available on VR platforms.

5 stars once the hit detection is rectified

developer_response.body:
Hey Tom
Thanks so much!🙏 Really appreciate you taking the time to dive in and share such thoughtful feedback.

We’re thrilled you’re enjoying the energy, soundtrack, and choreography — and you’re absolutely right about the hit-zone calibration. That’s something we’ve already flagged for tuning and will be refining in an upcoming update.

Your insights are incredibly helpful for us as we keep polishing Dance! Dance! Dance! VR — thanks again for helping make it even better!

Best Wishes

Tony (Vstars)

reviews.review_description: A really fun game to enjoy with friends and family, that would make for a great party game. The selection of tracks adds to the vibe of a virtual dance club. I would certainly recommend it to anyone who’s played Beat Saber or Just Dance, if you are looking for something similar. As the first game from a relatively new indie company, it is definitely a great start. I would love to see what comes next.

developer_response.body:
Hey Roxas A9
Thanks for taking the tine to post a review and we are really glad you like the game. 
We have new songs coming soon so watch out for notifications and please let us know what you think:-)
Thanks again 
Best Wishes
Tony (vstars)

reviews.review_description: I recently purchased this app on sale.   I’ve read the reviews, and I’m still confused on why I’m only able to load one song.   Does that mean I have to pay more for songs?   If so I did not read that anywhere before I purchased.   I know it was only .99 but paying for additional songs is not worth it.  Maybe I’m confused.   UPDATEUpdatedand I update

developer_response.body:
Dear CheriShoe
Just wanted to check if you had been able to resolve your problem?
If you are unable to access the discord channel try emailing us on admin@vstars.co.uk.
You can definitely access ALL the songs so we want to be sure you can do this
best wishes
Tony (vstars) 

Dear CheriShoe
Thanks for reaching out to us and we are really  sorry to hear about  the problems you have encountered. 
You should certainly have 16 songs in the game which are included in every purchase.  
Without knowing exactly what the problem is I can attempt to give you a quick guide.
1. When you first load the game you will see a PLAY button in the middle, just under the Dance! Dance! Dance! logo.
2. Click on this PLAY button and you will see a song list. 
3. You should be able to choose any of these songs, nd the difficulty and mode on the right.
4. You should also see a large PLAY button appear at the  bottom  of your view, in the middle, and when you press this the song should start. 
Please let me know you get on, and you can also open a ticket on our discord channel if you need any more detailed advice. 
Best wishes
Tony (vstars)

DISCORD SUPPORT LINK
https://discord.com/channels/1270302111229411428/1331218149680353311

reviews.review_description:
Background Graphics Issues: While playing, I observed that the background features round bubbles that collide and cause graphical glitches. This detracts from the overall visual quality of the game. The effect of these bubbles approaching the player feels very jarring, especially since it is presented in 2D, which creates a sense of dissonance.

Resource Allocation: I suggest reallocating resources to improve the quality of the round bubbles, as they are a focal point for players. The character dancing in the foreground could be simplified, as players are often too focused on handling the incoming notes to appreciate the details of the dancer. A more streamlined representation would enhance the overall experience without compromising gameplay.

I believe that addressing these issues could significantly improve the game’s quality and player satisfaction. If these problems are resolved, I would be more than willing to update my review score and confidently recommend the game to others.

developer_response.body:
Dear HaaN_Jabs

Thank you for taking the time to leave such a detailed review and even though it's only one star all feedback is appreciated, both good and bad. 

The first thing I would like to point out is that the current screenshots are totally accurate and all the songs listed are in the game.  There was a period before we started the promotion where the songs were removed in the game but it took longer than anticipated for the new meta data to be published so there was a potential for that misunderstanding.  However we have made it clear that anyone who bought the game during that period of time, or paid the full price for the game can request a voucher to redeem those tracks. If you are one of those people and please click the link belowand  raise a ticket on our discord channel and one of our team will send through a code.  https://discord.com/channels/1270302111229411428/1331218149680353311/1331224392910508118

I would also like to ask that you remove your comments about us intentionally trying to deceive which is simply not true as hopefully I have explained above. 

Moving onto your points about the bubbles causing a distraction and in some cases glitching, we fully take this on board and will look closely at this with a view to improving. 

Finally the dance instructor/avatar is something we have discussed at length internally and we have come to the conclusion that it is quite subjective. Focus groups showed that some people loved it and some people didn't even notice it so it's a difficult one to deal with.  We are planning to make the dance instructor optional which would hopefully resolve the problem.  

Thanks again for your feedback and we hope that over time as you see the updates come through you will be minded to look again and perhaps give us a more favourable review. 

Best Wishes

Tony (Vstars)

reviews.review_title: I can't get it to work...

developer_response.body:
Hey Grammy523

Best wishes,
Tony vStars

Dear Grammy523
Thanks for reaching out to us and letting us know about your problems.
We know there are some issues with the game and we are working hard to fix them, but fundamentally, the game does work and you should be able to load all the tracks and play the game.
Would it be possible for you to email admin@vStars.co.uk with a few more details? Then we can send you some screenshots with each stage of the loading process which may help.
Thanks again for your comments and look forward to hearing from you on email
Kind regards, 
Tony (Vstars)

reviews.review_description: Based on some of the other reviews/ratings I was expecting something pretty janky here, but it's actually a pretty decent dance game (imo).  The mechanics all seem to work fine, and while you always want more/better songs with a game like this, the core selection isn't terrible.  You can boogie to them.  It hasn't (yet) dethroned Synthriders for me as my favourite VR dance game, but at it's comparatively budget-friendly price point, it's a nice complimentary addition to my collection.  Worth a play for sure.  :)

developer_response.body:
Hi Mr Voodoo
Well firstly thanks for the positive comments - really appreciated! 
We have been refining the game and will be adding more music, but as this has been slow to appear  we understand that some of our community are a little frustrated. But please be assured they are coming and from May onwards there will definitely be some movement with new stuff appearing.  
Thanks again and we will continue to work hard to make improvements for our valued community :-)
Best Wishes
Tony (vstars)

reviews.review_description: There are no directions or tutorial that work.  It's nearly impossible to switch from song to song.  If you click on a song it won't respond.  Some times it will respond after clicking a bunch of other things, or closing out the app and opening it again. It's got potential,  but I don't understand why they would release something that barely works.

developer_response.body:
Dear mouseifer.2024
Thank you for your review which is greatly appreciated. 
The first thing I would like to say is on a general note, we are a small development team who were under considerable pressure to meet a release date and consequently certain things were missed for the release which we apologise for. (This is offered as mitigation and not an excuse :-)) 
You are not the first person to mention the tutorial and with hindsight we agree that we should've made this a priority rather than including more game features for the release. Please be assured that we will be addressing your point as a priority and you should see it come through very soon on one of the new updates.  
Your point about the song selection is also valid and noted. In the present menu you need to select the mode and difficulty level and the song before you press play. When the music changes from the menu music to the song you have chosen it should work but agree that making it  more straightforward  would be better and again we will look closely at this and make the necessary changes. 
Finally we can assure you we are hundred percent committed to resolving all of the issues you mention above and more and sincerely hope you will stick with us for the next few weeks. :-)
Thank you again for your comments and time and we look forward to working on these issues for you and all of our other customers 
Kind Regards
Tony (vStars)
Dear Mouseifer
We would like to let you know that there is now an update available which hopefully addresses both of the issues you raised in your initial review.  We have tried to make the songs more accessible and the play button will now glow when a song has been selected. 
Although we are working on a more sophisticated tutorial we have created a very simple help sheet which again will hopefully explain  a few of the basic functions. 
As mentioned previously your ongoing feedback is hugely appreciated, good or bad and thank you again for taking the time to engage with us. 
Kind Regards
Tony (vstars)

Dear Mouseifer
I wanted to request that you kindly consider reviewing the latest build to see if all your issues had been addressed?
We're obviously very keen to build our community and all feedback good and bad helps us to shape the product for the future. 
Please accept my apologies if this second email is inconvenient and look forward to your response. 
Kind regards
Tony (vstars)

reviews.review_description:
This game doesn't track any of the moves. The songs are terrible. It's not worth the $1, and that's saying something.

Idk how to reply, so I'll update here. When inload a level, it starts with hitting the round balls flying at you, and everytime I punch at them it says miss. It never registers and then it ends the game as a fail.

developer_response.body:
Dear MeowMix
We are really sorry to hear that you didn’t enjoy the game and that you didn’t like the music.

We will definitely be introducing some new tracks over the next 2 to 3 months so if you have any particular style that you like it would be useful to know and we can try and include something that would meet with your approval?

Also we don’t fully understand your comments about not tracking the moves? As you can see from the reviews, we know it’s not perfect, but some of our community absolutely  love the game so we’re wondering if it’s maybe something that you are not able to access? 

 If you could be more specific that would be really appreciated and again we will work to try and resolve.

I would finish by saying we appreciate all reviews good and bad so thanks for taking the time to give us your thoughts

Best Wishes
Tony (Vstars)

reviews.review_description: The one I purchased on sale is not the same as the one I tried on my friend's headset - there seems to be an extremely limited number of songs, sadly. That aside, this app is a lot of fun, I'm in. my 50's and makes me move in a fun way. Would be great to have the ability to access a wider song catalogue, play in pass through and or customize the avatar. Still glad I purchased it, as I'm hoping to see more to come!

reviews.review_title: Not a bad idea, no premium songs!
reviews.review_description:
UPDATE: Dear Tony (vstars)

I noticed your message however I did not get any code yet.

Review:
I was curious about the game's concept since it looks like the Beat Saber but for dance. Unfortunately, I just watched a few YouTube videos about the game itself, and I was surprised in a bad way when I noticed that the best songs are missing from the game library now so you would end up with unknown songs (at least for me). Where is the "Take On Me" for instance? They probably will be DLC. I feel a bit disappointed now, but the game itself is fun.

developer_response.body:
Dear Belakovics
Just wante dto cehck that you receibed my message below?
Best wishes
Tony (vstars) 

Dear Belakovics
Thank you for taking the time out to leave us a review and for giving us so much detail.  
We are really sorry that you saw some material online that indicated the license tracks were still available as we thought we had removed all reference to these.
However, we do at knowledge that there may have been some material out there so if you'd like to send us your discord ID we will send a code to redeem those tracks as a good will gesture. 
We will be working hard to make this game as good as possible for all of our community and thanks again for your valuable feedback. 
Best Wishes
Tony (Vstars)

developer_response.body:
Hi Davwinter
Every review is appreciated whether good or bad, so thank you for taking the time to express your views. 
We know there are issues and we understand your disappointment but we also know from test reviews that there is a great deal of potential in this game and we can make it extremely rewarding and enjoyable given a little bit of time. 
In my other responses I offered some explanation as to why these issues have occurred so would explain to you also that we were under a lot of pressure to meet the release date whilst at the same time hitting the high performance standards that Meta (quite rightly) set. 
It's not an excuse,  rather an attempt to offer  some mitigation in what has been a challenging time for a small developer like us, and more importantly a disappointing experience for you. To counter this I can absolutely guarantee you that we will be working tirelessly to win the confidence back of any disappointed customers including your good self. �
With Best wishes 
Tony (vStars)
Dear Davwinter
Not sure if you have actually got a refund yet but if not I wanted to let you know that we have publishing update which will hopefully improve a few things in the game.  
I'm sure you understand that you remain a valuable customer and feedback is essential to enable us to improve the game in line with customer requests.  
Hoping you are still with us. 
Kind regards
Tony (vstars)

Dear Davwinter
I wanted to request that you kindly consider reviewing the latest build to see if all your issues had been addressed?
We're obviously very keen to build our community and all feedback good and bad helps us to shape the product for the future. 
Please accept my apologies if this second email is inconvenient and look forward to your response. 
Kind regards
Tony (vstars)

reviews.review_description:
Doesn’t work at all. The menus come up but nothing works. 

I want a refund.

developer_response.body:
Hi Betty
Firstly thank you for taking the time to write a review. We appreciate all reviews good or bad because it helps highlight where we need to focus our efforts for all of our customers. 
Hopefully the other reviews will demonstrate that the game does work but we totally accept that the menu screen is not as intuitive as it should be and therefore can be difficult to access the first song. This is something we are addressing as a priority and it will be available on our first update on the 18th of October.  
If you could kindly hang fire till then I am absolutely sure that you will find the wait worthwhile. 
Thanks  again and please be assured will be working our socks off to make sure your experience is much better going forward. 
Best Wishes
Tony (vStars)
Hi Betty
Just wanted to let you know that we have now published an update which should come through automatically on your headset. Alternatively if you select the three dots next to the app listing on your headset there should be an update option which you can select 
This initial update has been totally driven by feedback from valued reviewers like your good self.  
We think we understand what the issue was as to why you couldn't access the game and now the play button should glow when you have selected the song. 
We would be really grateful if you could let us know whether this has resolved your issue and of course anything else that comes to mind that you need us to focus on. 
I sincerely hope that your experience is much better this time around and look forward to your feedback. 
Best Wishes
Tony (vstars)

Dear Bettyknitter
I wanted to request that you kindly consider reviewing the latest build to see if all your issues had been addressed?
We're obviously very keen to build our community and all feedback good and bad helps us to shape the product for the future. 
Please accept my apologies if this second email is inconvenient and look forward to your response. 
Kind regards
Tony (vstars)
